caption: A gamer is playing a sports video game, featuring a player named "TAYSOM HILL." In a small picture-in-picture window, a man with short blonde hair wearing a black shirt is visible in a room with a decorated Christmas tree behind him. The game interface displays a screen for "TE APPRENTICE," showing a cost of "200" and describing "Four additional hot routes when lined up at TE." A pop-up box asks, "You don't own this Ability. Do you want to craft it for 200 Training?" with a "Craft Ability" button. After the user interacts with the menu, the interface shifts to "EQUIP ABILITY," and a new prompt asks, "You own this Ability. Do you want to equip it?" with an "Equip Ability" option. The man's facial expression changes from a neutral look to an excited, open-mouthed expression as the ability is acquired and equipped.
